nodes.label: GameplayEffectMagnitudeCalculation
nodes.description: Enumeration outlining the possible gameplay effect magnitude calculation policies

nodes.label: SCALABLE_FLOAT
nodes.description: Use a simple, scalable float for the calculation

nodes.label: ATTRIBUTE_BASED
nodes.description: Perform a calculation based upon an attribute

nodes.label: CUSTOM_CALCULATION_CLASS
nodes.description: Perform a custom calculation, capable of capturing and acting on multiple attributes

nodes.label: SET_BY_CALLER
nodes.description: This magnitude will be set explicitly by the code/blueprint that creates the spec

nodes.description: Node to handle re-targeting of Hand IK bone chain

nodes.label: __init__
nodes.signature: def __init__(component_pose: ComponentSpacePoseLink = [], lod_threshold: int = 0, alpha_input_type: AnimAlphaInputType = AnimAlphaInputType.FLOAT, alpha_bool_enabled: bool = False, alpha: float = 0.000000, alpha_scale_bias: InputScaleBias = [1.000000, 0.000000], alpha_bool_blend: InputAlphaBoolBlend = [0.000000, 0.000000, AlphaBlendOption.LINEAR, None], alpha_curve_name: Name = "None", alpha_scale_bias_clamp: InputScaleBiasClamp = [False, False, False, [0.000000, 1.000000], [0.000000, 1.000000], 1.000000, 0.000000, 0.000000, 1.000000, 10.000000, 10.000000], per_axis_alpha: Vector = [0.000000, 0.000000, 0.000000], hand_fk_weight: float = 0.000000) -> None

nodes.label: per_axis_alpha
nodes.description: Alpha values per axis to apply on the resulting retargeting translation

nodes.label: hand_fk_weight
nodes.description: Which hand to favor. 0.5 is equal weight for both, 1 = right hand, 0 = left hand

nodes.label: alpha
nodes.description: Current strength of the skeletal control

nodes.label: ik_bones_to_move
nodes.description: IK Bones to move

nodes.label: left_hand_fk
nodes.description: Bone for Left Hand FK

nodes.label: left_hand_ik
nodes.description: Bone for Left Hand IK

nodes.label: right_hand_fk
nodes.description: Bone for Right Hand FK

nodes.label: right_hand_ik
nodes.description: Bone for Right Hand IK

nodes.label: lod_threshold
nodes.description: Max LOD that this node is allowed to run

nodes.description: Material Expression Particle Position WS

nodes.label: desc
nodes.description: A description that level designers can add (shows in the material editor UI)

nodes.label: SynthSamplePlayer
nodes.description: Synth Sample Player

nodes.label: set_sound_wave
nodes.description: This will override the current sound wave if one is set, stop audio, and reload the new sound wave

nodes.label: PCGComponent
nodes.description: PCGComponent

nodes.label: is_component_partitioned
nodes.description: Will partition the component in a grid, dispatching the generation to multiple local components

nodes.label: scheduling_policy_class
nodes.description: A Scheduling Policy dictates the order in which instances of this component will be scheduled

nodes.label: scheduling_policy
nodes.description: This is the instanced UPCGSchedulingPolicy object which holds scheduling parameters and calculates priorities

nodes.label: only_track_itself
nodes.description: Even if the graph has external dependencies, the component won't react to them

nodes.label: ignore_landscape_tracking
nodes.description: Marks the component to be not refreshed automatically when the landscape changes

nodes.label: generated
nodes.description: Flag to indicate whether this component has run in the editor

nodes.label: post_generate_function_names
nodes.description: Can specify a list of functions from the owner of this component to be called when generation is done

nodes.label: notify_properties_changed_from_blueprint
nodes.description: Notify properties changed, used in runtime cases, will dirty & trigger a regeneration if needed

nodes.label: get_generated_graph_output
nodes.description: Retrieves generated data

nodes.label: get_editing_mode
nodes.description: Returns the current editing mode

nodes.label: generate_local
nodes.description: Starts generation from a local (vs. remote) standpoint. Will not be replicated. Will be delayed

nodes.label: generate
nodes.description: Networked generation call that also activates the component as needed

nodes.label: clear_pcg_link
nodes.description: Move all generated resources under a new actor, following a template, clearing all link to this PCG component

nodes.label: cleanup_local
nodes.description: Cleans up the generation from a local (vs. remote) standpoint. Will not be replicated. Will be delayed

nodes.label: cleanup
nodes.description: Networked cleanup call

nodes.label: add_to_managed_resources
nodes.description: Registers some managed resource to the current component

nodes.label: add_components_to_managed_resources
nodes.description: Creates a managed component resource and adds it to the current component

nodes.label: add_actors_to_managed_resources
nodes.description: Creates a managed actors resource and adds it to the current component

nodes.label: refresh_pcg_runtime_component
nodes.description: Refresh a component set to Generate At Runtime, if some parameters changed

nodes.label: GeometryScriptSmoothBoneWeightsOptions
nodes.description: Geometry Script Smooth Bone Weights Options

nodes.label: __init__
nodes.signature: def __init__(distance_weighing_type: GeometryScriptSmoothBoneWeightsType = GeometryScriptSmoothBoneWeightsType.DIRECT_DISTANCE, stiffness: float = 0.000000, max_influences: int = 0, voxel_resolution: int = 0) -> None

nodes.label: distance_weighing_type
nodes.description: The type of algorithm to use for computing the bone weight for each vertex

nodes.label: stiffness
nodes.description: How rigid the binding should be. Higher values result in a more rigid binding

nodes.label: max_influences
nodes.description: Maximum number of bones that contribute to each weight

nodes.label: voxel_resolution
nodes.description: The resolution to build the voxelized representation of the mesh

nodes.label: AnimAlphaInputType
nodes.description: AnimNodes using an Alpha can choose how it is driven

hyperedges.description: Hand IK retargeting workflow involving animation nodes, alpha input types, and skeletal control
Niagara effects system for particle and visual effects
Procedural Content Generation system for dynamic content creation
Audio synthesis system for sound and music generation
Material expression system for shader and material creation
Deprecated classes that have been renamed
Gameplay ability system for effect magnitude calculations
Geometry scripting system for mesh manipulation
Animation notification system for handling animation events
